messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: On it. All endpoint p99 latencies jumped to exactly 30 000 ms. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: frank_nguyen
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Root cause: The NGINX config change placed proxy_read_timeout 30s in the http {} block inste.... Rolling back.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
